legacy.full_text:
What is intelligence? Is intelligence
innate? Can we give a clear definition of
intelligence? Regarding the definition of
intelligence, academics and psychologists
have made many definitions based on the
distinctive qualities of people with
intelligence. #NFT #NFTCommunity
#NFTs
